# Daggers
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Daggers&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom daggers and old daggers that have been edited from how they appear on the production RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Daggers
!Damage
!Range
!RoF
!Shots
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal Effect
|-
|'''Dagger of Sinister Deeds'''
|100-185
|5.88
|
|
|
|
|
|
|5%
|T13
|
|-
|'''Dagger of Dire Hatred'''
|110-195
|5.88
|
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|T14
|
|-
|Cometstrike Dirk
|125-205
|5.88
|
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Destructor Dagger
|105-175
|5
|90%
|
|
|Yes
|Yes
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Dagger of Goddess of  Goddesses
|150-190
|5.99
|85%
|
|
|
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Firebreather's Tail
|85-190
|5.5
|
|
|
|
|
|Yes
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Shadowscale's Horn
|95-165
|5.6
|125%
|
|<nowiki>+4att</nowiki>
+2spd
|Yes
|Yes
|Yes
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Dagger of the Endless Void
|95-135
|5
|
|2
|
|Yes
|
|
|7%
|Legendary
|Curse
|-
|PoOoOoOokkErrRr
|150-220
|6.01
|115%
|
|<nowiki>+5dex</nowiki>
|Yes
|
|
|7%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|-
|Loki's Dagger
|100-180
|4.5
|120%
|2
|
|
|Yes
|
|7%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Chicken Leg of Doom
|65-105
|6
|90%
|
|
|
|
|
|4%
|Legendary
|Throwback
|-
|Spirit Dagger
|250-400
|5.2
|67%
|
|
|
|
|
|4%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Dirk of Cronus
|165-275
|4.5
|110%
|
|<nowiki>+6wis</nowiki>
|
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Curse
|}
